title: Publish first trusted-publisher PyPI release
description: Add PyPI metadata changes to trigger a new semantic-release publish via trusted publisher and verify release appears on PyPI.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_notes:
Adding PyPI metadata to trigger semantic-release publish via trusted publisher.
Added license expression to fix build; manually uploaded 0.2.0 to PyPI (https://pypi.org/project/taskulus/0.2.0/). Trusted publisher release step still reports success but PyPI index lagged; manual upload confirmed.
